name: Rising Moonshade
short_description: Rising Moonshade is a turn-based strategy game set in a medieval fantasy world. Lead your squad through ever-changing missions—gather resources, forge equipment, and build tactical playstyles. Under the dual pressure of survival and combat, you must ultimately withstand the Demon King's invasion.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Sniper Game
short_description: Sniper Game is a first-person precision shooter built on a single idea: prove you are the best shot in the world. One handcrafted battleground, relentless escalating waves, and a global leaderboard scoring every shot. Two buildings, three rankings — climb the World Championship.

name: 玄中记
short_description: An Eastern fantasy cel-shaded MMORPG inspired by ancient mythology, set in the open Xuanzhong world. Explore a massive hand-painted map, capture & breed beasts, build your home, trade freely, join guild battles—embark on an immersive Xianxia adventure!
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: A Love Letter in Snowfall
short_description: <A Love Letter in Snowfall> is a live-action, multi-ending interactive romance movie game. As a young B&B keeper in a small southern town, you meet, and fall for a visiting actress—every choice rewrites your love story. Meet someone, and fall in love that trembles in bones.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: TheVillage: Possession
short_description: TheVillage: Possession is a first-person horror game where you return to a cursed village to uncover the truth behind a failed ritual. Explore abandoned locations, solve puzzles, collect doll parts, and survive terrifying supernatural encounters while an unseen force manipulates your mind.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: XiuXian Idle Cultivation
short_description: Sneaky Cultivation is a transparent desktop idle RPG about quietly growing stronger while you work or study. Keep a tiny battle window on screen, auto-slay monsters, collect gear and treasures, combine cultivation skills, and break through from Qi Refining to True Immortal.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10

name: Sail Girl
short_description: Build your waifu fleet in Sail Girl, an idle RPG where kawaii anime girls await your command. Recruit, romance, and collect your dream team through gacha summons and daring voyages. Sail seas, enjoy hot spring dates, and bond with your crew on the way to the fabled Blue Pearl.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10

name: Linkshift
short_description: A roguelite puzzle game for tinkerers and pixel junkies. Link Nodes, use Relics, get upgrades, find synergies, create massive combos, feel good.

name: Atomcraft
short_description: A sandbox adventure where every pixel is physically and chemically simulated! Build intricate, fully functional machines from the pixels around you. Harvest, react, and manipulate all 118 elements to craft everything from simple tools to complex systems.

name: Stained Roses & Lilies

name: Reefling: A Cozy Desktop Aquarium
short_description: Reefling is a calm desktop aquarium that sits in the corner of your screen. Feed your fish with a click, earn shells over time, and collect over 150 pixel-art species.
